case_for: Ertz has cleared 12 points in 4 of his last 6 games, including three straight games above 12.5 points before this matchup, showing consistent target volume and red-zone usage.
case_against: His week 9 (1.5) and week 10 (7.1) outings reveal a volatile floor tied to target-share fluctuations, meaning a quiet game could easily leave him well under the threshold.
